title: Spears Overhaul
body:
![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59db20a3557004da8688097e02c49b6afc36b2db.png)
### **Spear Overhaul**

When you look at the texture of spear and thinks it's a bit off, or feel like something is mising ? 
- This resonrce pack retexture the texture of every spear, so it looks amazing!
- This resource pack adds some detail to the spear !
- It adds a riben to the spear and add what ever this thing is . 
  ![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fd8db94449fdba7851ceea1eef5ab779e237060.png)
- It also change the spike fo the spear more sharp.
## _**Features**_:
1.Runs smoothly with Vanilla.

2.Totaly FREE to download!

3.Simply drag this into the resource pack folder, and click the start button to active the resource pack, DONE!
